title: First Earth Bridge Alliance success story
description: Successful completion of Phase 1 strengthens institutional credibility and creates a foundation for future partnerships.
recommended_action: Document campaign progress, institutional milestones, and execution evidence from day one.

title: ExecutiveStateProtocol
description: Stable executive contract enables JasperOS implementation and future CompanyOS consumption.

title: Domain-based executive architecture
description: Domain providers allow JasperOS and future CompanyOS systems to scale without changing the canonical executive contract.

title: JasperOS Next.js foundation
description: Completed framework migration creates a production-ready foundation for Executive Cockpit development and future platform capabilities.

title: AI-assisted development environment
description: Ubuntu VM, Code Server, and OpenCode create a repeatable engineering workflow connecting executive decisions with implementation.
